Credits

Arch-Builder is created and maintained by Manuel Rosa.

  • Email: manuelsilvarosa@gmail.com

  • License: MIT License

Project and Documentation

This project is released under the MIT License and is intended for free use, modification, and redistribution.

If you wish to contribute, please open issues or pull requests for:

  • bug fixes

  • documentation updates

  • additional build profiles

  • tooling improvements

See the LICENSE file for full license text.
